title: Vorpal Enchantment
description: Are you tired of having to kill hundreds of Wither Skeleton for just a few heads? Well, no more!
body:
Get More Wither Skeleton Heads!

Do you find the rate at which Wither Skeletons drop their heads to be far too low? But don't want to use a mod or datapack that makes it too easy? Then the Vorpal Enchantment Mod is for you!

This mod adds a new enchantment called Vorpal, which can be attached to both Axes and Swords and comes with three levels. Each level increases the chance of a killed mob dropping its head. The best part? The enchantment is balanced to ensure that it's not too cheaty, and isn't compatible with looting and fortune enchantments, so you'll have to choose which enchantments you want to use.

The Vorpal Enchantment Mod provides a less cheaty way to collect Wither Skeleton heads (and other mobs), without making the game too easy. In addition, you can tweak the chances to your liking with the config option.

What sets the Vorpal Enchantment Mod apart is its balanced approach to increasing the chances of getting mob heads, without compromising the overall game balance. It's a unique and useful addition to any player's arsenal.

Note for Modpack Makers

You're free to use our mods in your Modpacks so long the download is redirected either to here or CurseForge. No credit is necessary, although appreciated! Thanks for using our mods!
